title: dendranthema arcticum subsp. maekawana
intro: Dendranthema arcticum subsp. maekawana, commonly known as Maekawa Chrysanthemum, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). It is native to Japan and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving headaches and sore throats, and supporting respiratory health. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its modern uses and preparations may vary depending on the region and available research.
